This test checks that signature-help documentation renders doc links to private
packages as plain text while preserving public links.

-- env --
GOPRIVATE=example.com/sigdoclinks

-- settings.json --
{
	"hoverKind": "FullDocumentation"
}

-- go.mod --
module example.com/sigdoclinks

go 1.20

-- sig.go --
package sigdoclinks

import "encoding/json"

type Value struct{}

// Encode marshals [Value] with [json.Marshal].
func Encode(v Value) ([]byte, error) {
	return json.Marshal(v)
}

func _() {
	Encode(Value{}) //@signature("Encode", "Encode(v Value) ([]byte, error)", -1, doc=EncodeDoc)
}

-- @EncodeDoc --
Encode marshals Value with [json.Marshal](https://pkg.go.dev/encoding/json#Marshal).
